chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text: The commission may require the City of Laredo to execute, at its own expense, a surety bond payable to the Texas Department of Transportation in an amount of not less than $500,000 for costs of maintenance for the roadways described by Section 623.382 (Issuance of Permits) (a).
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.383 — Surety Bond

The commission may require the City of Laredo to execute, at its own expense, a surety bond payable to the Texas Department of Transportation in an amount of not less than $500,000 for costs of maintenance for the roadways described by Section 623.382 (Issuance of Permits) (a).

*Added by Acts 2015, 84th Leg., R.S., Ch. 870 (H.B.2861), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2015.*
